# Sentinelayer CLI (LLM Index)

## Project
- Name: sentinelayer-cli
- Purpose: deterministic CLI for secure AI engineering workflows, Omar gating, and multi-agent session coordination.
- Repository: https://github.com/mrrCarter/create-sentinelayer

## Retrieval Order
1. README.md
2. docs/ENGINEERING_ONBOARDING.md
3. docs/sessions.md
4. docs/MULTI_AGENT_SESSION_SPEC.md
5. AGENTS.md
6. tasks/omar_daemon_hitl_architecture.md

## Session Surface
- Commands: `sl session start|join|say|read|status|leave|list|kill`
- Session stream: NDJSON event log with canonical agent event schema
- Governance: Omar pass-two requires `P0=0` and `P1=0` before merge

## Guardrails
- Fail closed on P0/P1.
- Preserve artifact lineage and reproducibility evidence.
- Keep rollback and kill-switch controls available per session.

## Docs
- Engineering onboarding: docs/ENGINEERING_ONBOARDING.md
- Session guide: docs/sessions.md
- Architecture spec: docs/MULTI_AGENT_SESSION_SPEC.md
